title: orobanche galii var. clausonis
intro: Orobanche galii var. clausonis, also known as the Yellow Rattle, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Orobanche galii var. clausonis include its ability to soothe digestive issues such as diarrhea, reduce inflammation in the body, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
